{{Infobox technique
| name = Hollow Domain
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Hollow Domain Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Hollow Domain is a powerful technique utilized by [[Lindon]], characterized as a dome or sphere of blue-white [[pure madra]]. This technique is rooted in the property of [[Emptiness]], a principle where [[pure madra]] dilutes and replaces other elements. When active, the domain acts as a field of absolute emptiness that can wipe out various forms of [[madra]], including [[dragon]]'s breath, death [[madra]], [[shadow madra]], and various [[sacred artist]] techniques. It has been used to disperse spiritual entities, disrupt enemy abilities, and provide protection by neutralizing incoming attacks or environmental pressures. Beyond its offensive and defensive capabilities, the Hollow Domain serves several utility functions. It can be used to create a private space that prevents eavesdropping or scanning by others, and it can act as a barrier to shield allies from external attacks. [[Lindon]] can also manipulate the size and reach of the domain, ranging from a small sphere around his body to an expansive field covering miles of terrain. While highly effective at neutralizing energy and techniques, maintaining the domain can be physically taxing and serves as a drain on his [[madra]] reserves.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] gained the ability to unleash the Hollow Domain, a power that evokes a sensation of absolute emptiness and the death of the spirit. This technique is potent enough to eliminate weaker versions of the echo Forger technique. While traveling, [[Lindon]] carried the domain within an orb surrounding his person. During combat, he utilized the Hollow Domain to successfully wipe out various [[Striker techniques]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] can unleash the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s [[Hollow Domain]] could eliminate a weaker version of the echo Forger technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] used the [[Hollow Domain]] to wipe out [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] carried the [[Hollow Domain]] in an orb around him.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Hollow Domain]] feels like absolute emptiness and the death of the spirit.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A gust of the [[Hollow Domain]] was used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can flood out the [[Hollow Domain]] to push against pressure.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] used a [[Hollow Domain]] to meet the [[Titan]]'s yellow earth madra.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Hollow Domain is a field or location utilized by [[Lindon]] that initially serves to push away pale demons. This technique can be partially manifested by [[Little Blue]] and has the capacity to clear [[hunger madra]] from a room, though strands of [[hunger madra]] have been known to push through it. While [[Lindon]] can extend the domain using blue-white madra, the technique has experienced flickering and required him to attempt cycling for it. Ultimately, the domain can weaken [[madra]] and has been used by [[Lindon]] to flee from an attack.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s [[Hollow Domain]] pushes away pale demons.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] can partially manifest the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can extend a [[Hollow Domain]] of blue-white madra.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Hollow Domain]] is a technique that can clear [[hunger madra]] from a room.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Hunger [[madra]] strands push through the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Hollow Domain]] flickered.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] attempted to cycle for the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s [[Hollow Domain]] can weaken [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used the [[Hollow Domain]] to flee from an attack.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Hollow Domain]] is a location or field used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Hollow Domain manifests as a blue-white circle of [[pure madra]]. [[Lindon]] utilizes this ability to prevent others from overhearing private conversations held within its bounds. During a descent on his [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]], he employs the technique to catch himself and subsequently projects it as a protective dome. In combat, [[Lindon]] uses the domain for defense, demonstrating its capacity to weaken shadow blades.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s [[Hollow Domain]] prevents others from overhearing conversations within it.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Hollow Domain]] is a blue-white circle of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] used his [[Hollow Domain]] to catch himself on his [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] projects a dome of the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] uses his [[Hollow Domain]] for defense.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Hollow Domain]] can weaken shadow blades.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A Hollow Domain is a sphere of [[madra]] capable of wiping out two quick [[Striker techniques]] or neutralizing excess energy. [[Lindon]] utilizes this technique to create space for healing, manage incoming needles, and weaken a [[dragon]]'s breath. While [[Lindon]]'s version can stretch for miles to cover terrain from the ground to the sky, [[Little Blue]] also employs the ability through brief eruptions and tiny bubbles of blue-white energy to defend herself.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Hollow Domain]] can wipe out two quick [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses a [[Hollow Domain]] to create space while healing.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] was surrounded by a tiny bubble of blue-white energy known as a [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] calls up the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s [[Hollow Domain]] is a sphere of [[madra]] that can stretch for miles.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Hollow Domain]] covers terrain from ground to sky and miles in every direction.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Hollow Domain]] technique can be used to weaken the [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Hollow Domain]] to deal with needles.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] defended herself with a brief eruption of the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] uses a [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Hollow Domain]] can wipe out excess energy.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] released the [[Hollow Domain]] using his pure core.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Hollow Domain]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]] that washes out [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] uses a pulse of the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Blue]] uses a [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
